"I would rather have questions that can't be answered than answers that can't be questioned."

FEYNMAN

Adventure. Connect. Entertain.

Why Feynman?Begin Your Journey

"The beauty of a flower is deeper when you understand it." — RPF

Welcome to Feynman.

Most safari companies show you Africa. We want you to understand it.

Our name comes from Richard Feynman—a Nobel Prize-winning physicist who believed that wonder was the driving force of all discovery. He could explain the most complex ideas with such clarity and joy that you forgot you were learning.

At Feynman Safaris, we apply that same philosophy to every journey. We obsess over your experience so you can obsess over the wonder around you.

Read Our Story

"We don't just take you places. We take you there differently."

Entertain

Safaris should delight, not just educate. We surprise. We indulge. We create moments that feel like they belong in a film. A sundowner where you least expect it. A story around the campfire. A picnic in the middle of nowhere.

Adventure

Curiosity is our compass. We don't follow the same roads as everyone else. We ask questions. We follow tracks. We help you discover not just wildlife, but the why behind it all.

Connect

To the land. To the wildlife. To the people. To yourself. A Feynman safari leaves you changed—because you've truly connected with something deeper than a photograph.

Curated for the Curious

Four ways to experience Kenya. One philosophy behind them all.

Private Safaris

Your vehicle. Your guide. Your pace. No compromises. Just discovery.

Explore

Luxury Safaris

Wilderness wrapped in elegance. Where comfort meets the extraordinary.

Explore

Group Joining Tours

Share the wonder with kindred spirits. Fixed departures, flexible souls.

Explore

Bespoke Journeys

Tell us your dream. We'll build it. No limits. No templates. Just you.

Explore

Places That Stay With You

Maasai Mara

The land of the big cats and the great migration.

Amboseli

Elephants against Kilimanjaro.

Samburu

The Special Five. Arid beauty.

Tsavo

Red elephants. Vast spaces.

Diani Beach

White sand. Turquoise water.

Serengeti

The endless plains.

Stories to Fuel Your Curiosity

Why the Mara Deserves Four Days, Not Two

Most tours rush through. Here's why slowing down changes everything.

The Secret Language of Acacia Trees

They communicate. They defend themselves. They're smarter than you think.

What I Learned Following Elephants for a Week

Patience, family, and the wisdom of the herd.

Read All Stories

Not Just Clients. Fellow Travelers.

"

I've been on safaris before. But never like this. Our guide didn't just point out animals—he taught us to see them. To understand them. By the end, I felt like I was saying goodbye to friends.

— SARAH, LONDON

Private Safari, Maasai Mara

Ready for Something Deeper?

A Feynman safari isn't just a trip. It's a transformation. Let's start designing yours.

"The same equations have the most beautiful solutions." — RPF
